description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, elongated layout. The property features a driveway with a parked car, a landscaped front yard, and a large backyard that includes a tennis court and several garden areas. The house itself has large windows, open-plan living spaces, and multiple entry points, with greenery integrated throughout the design. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and green from the landscaping. The structure appears to be constructed from concrete, glass, and metal, with a sleek, minimalist aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an expansive backyard featuring a tennis court and landscaped gardens. The exterior is white with gray and green accents, showcasing a sleek, open design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, landscaped front yard, and car parking area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, backyard tennis court, and garden spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tennis court, backyard, and rear facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the property, including the house, gardens, and tennis court.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide, modern door, minimal steps, and a landscaped approach with no porch or columns.
